name: GitHub: Secrets Reachable by User
query:
MATCH p=(:GH_User)-[:GH_HasRole|GH_HasBaseRole|GH_MemberOf*1..]->(:GH_RepoRole)-[:GH_WriteRepoContents]->(:GH_Repository)-[:GH_HasSecret]->(s)
WHERE s:GH_RepoSecret
OR s:GH_OrgSecret
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
description: Returns all repo and org secrets reachable by users through write access. Users with write access can create GitHub Actions workflows to access secrets.
